nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Atlapetes
nodes.summary: Atlapetes（Atlapetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如Rufous-capped brushfinch、White-naped brushfinch、Yellow-thighed brushfinch等32种鸟类。

nodes.name: Apurímac brushfinch
nodes.summary: Apurímac brushfinch（Atlapetes forbesi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Apurímac brushfinch。

nodes.name: Apurímac brushfinch
nodes.summary: The Apurímac brushfinch or Apurimac brushfinch (Atlapetes forbesi) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to woodland and shrub in the Andes of southern Peru. It is sometimes included as a subspecies of the rufous-eared brush finch. References
